title: ASR Outdoor 400lb Neodymium Magnet Fishing Kit with 550 Paracord Rope, 3pc
description:
Providing unparalleled levels of magnetism, and much stronger magnetic fields than ceramic or ferrite magnets, this permanent rare earth neodymium magnet fishing kit from ASR Outdoor is the most reliable and efficient tool for magnetic fishing, underwater salvaging, treasure hunting, seeking lost items or hard to reach magnetic objects and much more. An exciting and rewarding hobby, take to your local river, lake or beach to see what you might discover! Or if you’re avid boater or fisher, include this magnetic retrieval tool with your fishing gear or boating accessories to see what you can pull up on your next outing

ASR Outdoor 400lb Neodymium Magnet Fishing Kit with 550 Paracord Rope, 3pc

Providing unparalleled levels of magnetism, and much stronger magnetic fields than ceramic or ferrite magnets, this permanent rare earth neodymium magnet fishing kit from ASR Outdoor is the most reliable and efficient tool for magnetic fishing, underwater salvaging, treasure hunting, seeking lost items or hard to reach magnetic objects and much more.

An exciting and rewarding hobby, take to your local river, lake or beach to see what you might discover! Or if you’re avid boater or fisher, include this magnetic retrieval tool with your fishing gear or boating accessories to see what you can pull up on your next outing.

Key Features

  • MAGNET FISHING KIT: This magnet fishing kit includes a rare earth neodymium magnet, a 304 stainless steel locking snap hook and 60 feet of black 550 paracord rope; the neodymium magnet boasts a high quality, rust resistant 400lb pull strength for unparalleled magnetic retrieval
  • HIGH QUALITY NEODYMIUM MAGNET: Made from an alloy of neodymium, iron and boron, which creates an incredibly strong permanent rare earth magnet; with a 400lb pull strength, you’ll be able to retrieve metal objects quickly and securely
  • MAGNETIC RETRIEVAL TOOL: Search for or find lost metal objects in rivers, lakes, oceans, on beaches, in parks, your backyard and more; this multipurpose magnetic retrieval tool can do everything from helping to collect hard to reach nuts and bolts lost in your workshop, to retrieving undiscovered treasure on your next fishing or boating trip
  • 550 PARACORD AND HOOK: Included with the magnetic fishing kit are 60 feet of black 550 paracord and 304 stainless steel locking snap hook, meaning the magnetic fishing, treasure hunting, underwater salvaging and more can start right out of the box with minimal assembly required
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Magnet Dimensions: 2.37 x 2.0 inches; Kit Weight: 1.44lbs

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 1RUFFXAN
  • UPC: 810131703219
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: Medium

This three piece magnet fishing kit from ASR Outdoor includes a rare earth neodymium magnet, a 304 stainless steel locking snap hook and 60 feet of black 550 paracord rope; the neodymium magnet boasts a high quality, rust resistant 400lb pull strength for unparalleled magnetic retrieval of lost or undiscovered items.

Included with the magnetic fishing kit are 60 feet of black 550 paracord and 304 stainless steel locking snap hook, meaning the magnetic fishing, treasure hunting, underwater salvaging and more can start right out of the box, with little assembly required. Good luck!

Magnet Dimensions: 2.37 x 2.0 inches

Kit Weight: 1.44lbs
